# hexsel.io

> Anderson Hexsel — Senior Manager, Cloud & Platform Architect at PwC Canada

Anderson Hexsel is a senior cloud infrastructure leader with 18+ years of experience in enterprise Azure architecture, large-scale cloud migrations, and AI-integrated platform modernization. Currently leading cloud transformation programs for regulated Canadian enterprises at PwC Canada in Toronto.

## About

- Role: Senior Manager — Cloud & Platform Architect
- Company: PwC Canada, Toronto, ON (Aug 2024 – Present)
- Experience: 18+ years across enterprise IT, datacenter operations, and Azure cloud
- Focus: Azure Landing Zones, AI Integration, FinOps, Governance, Cloud Migration

## Services

- **Cloud Architecture**: Azure enterprise landing zones, hub-spoke networking, Private Link, Entra ID, secure hybrid connectivity for regulated environments
- **Cloud Migration**: Datacenter-to-Azure transformations using Azure Migrate, Site Recovery, custom wave-planning tooling (1,200+ servers delivered)
- **DevOps & IaC**: CI/CD pipelines, Terraform, Bicep, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, AKS
- **FinOps & Governance**: Cloud operating models, cost governance, SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance, PwC Global Cloud standards
